XMLElement.comments: Valid-from date - in current Release only 00010101 possible
XMLElement.name: FROM_DATE

XMLElement.comments: Valid-to date in current Release only 99991231 possible
XMLElement.name: TO_DATE

XMLElement.comments: Converted name field (with form of address)
XMLElement.name: CONV_NAME

XMLElement.comments: District code for City and Street file
XMLElement.name: DISTRCT_NO

XMLElement.comments: (Not Supported)City Postal Code Extension, e.g. ZIP+4+2 Code
XMLElement.name: PCODE1_EXT

XMLElement.comments: (Not Supported) PO Box Postal Code Extension
XMLElement.name: PCODE2_EXT

XMLElement.comments: (Not Supported) Major Customer Postal Code Extension
XMLElement.name: PCODE3_EXT

XMLElement.comments: Region for PO Box (Country/Region, State, Province, ...)
XMLElement.name: PO_BOX_REG

XMLElement.comments: Transportation zone to or from which the goods are delivered
XMLElement.name: TRANSPZONE

XMLElement.comments: Extension (only for data conversion) (e.g. data line)
XMLElement.name: EXTENS_1

XMLElement.comments: Standard Sender Address in this Communication Type
XMLElement.name: STD_NO

XMLElement.comments: Flag: Recipient is standard recipient for this number
XMLElement.name: STD_RECIP

XMLElement.comments: Flag: Connected to an SAP System
XMLElement.name: R_3_USER

XMLElement.comments: Recipient address in this communication type (mail sys.grp)
XMLElement.name: HOME_FLAG

XMLElement.comments: Flag: This Communication Number is Not Used
XMLElement.name: FLG_NOUSE

XMLElement.name: STD_NO

XMLElement.comments: Encoded Reference to a Sequence Number
XMLElement.name: STD_RECIP

XMLElement.name: TYPE

XMLElement.name: LOG_MSG_NO

XMLElement.comments: Logical system from which message originates
XMLElement.name: SYSTEM

XMLElement.name: CONTEXT

XMLElement.name: IV_CURRENT_COMM_DATA
